name: forkline
description: A focused desktop Git client for local, private and self-hosted repositories.

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/git-service.js && node --check src/git-profile-rules.js && node --check src/command-line.js && node --check src/repository-watcher.js && node --check src/renderer/graph-layout.js && node --check src/renderer/app.js
